title: Xtra Creamy British Smoked Salmon Scotch Egg
description: A rich and creamy twist on the classic Scotch egg, featuring smoked salmon and a satvik-friendly reduction, perfect for a midnight craving. This dish is a fatty and indulgent treat from Yorkshire.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
Mix the cream cheese, chives, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper in a bowl until well combined.
Wrap each hard-boiled egg in a layer of the cream cheese mixture, then a layer of flaked smoked salmon.
Place the wrapped eggs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the eggs.
Bake the eggs in the preheated oven for 12 minutes.
Remove the eggs from the oven and let them cool for 5 minutes.
Serve the Xtra Creamy British Smoked Salmon Scotch Eggs warm.
Garnish with additional chives if desired.
